session.user: Run `ty check` and report results. Only report errors in these files: - src/erk/cli/commands/pr/checkout_cmd.py - src/erk/cli/commands/pr/prepare_cmd.py - src/erk/cli/commands/pr/__init__.py - src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/setup_impl_from_pr.py Do NOT fix any errors.
session.assistant: I'll run `ty check` and report only errors from the specified files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run type checker and capture all output

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 error[unresolved-attribute]: Attribute `retrack_branch` is not defined on `None` in union `GraphiteBranchOps | None` --> src/erk/cli/commands/pr/checkout_cmd.py:305:13 | 303 | if ctx.branch_manager.get_parent_branch(repo.root, branch_name) is not None: 304 | # Already tracked — retrack to update Graphite's cached SHA 305 | ctx.graphite_branch_ops.retrack_branch(repo.root, branch_name) | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 306 | else: 307 | ctx.console.info("Tracking branch with Graphite...") | info: rule `unresolved-attribute` is enabled by default
Found 1 diagnostic
session.assistant:
**ty check failed: 1 issue found**
Error in `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/checkout_cmd.py:305:13`: - **Rule**: `unresolved-attribute` - **Message**: Attribute `retrack_branch` is not defined on `None` in union `GraphiteBranchOps | None` - **Code context**: `ctx.graphite_branch_ops.retrack_branch(repo.root, branch_name)`
The type checker detected that `ctx.graphite_branch_ops` could be `None`, but the code is calling `.retrack_branch()` without a null check. The attribute is only defined on `GraphiteBranchOps`, not on the `None` type in the union.
